input_context.decision_surface: How validators and operators should treat AMM pool discrepancies after AMM activation but before the fix amendment.

source_facts.claim: The AMM amendment went live on 2024-03-22.
A community member identified discrepancies in a few AMM pools indicating transactions were not executing as intended.
The official update said the fix required an amendment and advised users to redeem LP tokens and avoid new AMM deposits until the fix was enabled.

input_context.triage_question: Choose the conservative validator review route for this amendment decision surface as if evaluating it at decision time. Do not treat a historical packet as rejected merely because the real-world event is now complete.
